metadata.description: Visualize how knowledge is distributed across all your projects - see which projects have the most documentation, decisions, and patterns
metadata.author: system
use_cases: Identifying which projects need more documentation
Finding cross-project patterns and shared knowledge
Onboarding overview - see all projects at a glance

explanation.what: Groups all knowledge nodes by their project/branch, showing you a birds-eye view of your entire knowledge portfolio
explanation.why: Helps you see which projects are well-documented vs under-documented, identify knowledge gaps, and understand the scope of each project
explanation.when: Use this when starting a new session, planning work across projects, or reviewing your knowledge portfolio health
explanation.how: Each project becomes a group showing all its nodes (decisions, research, blockers, etc.). Projects with more nodes appear larger/more prominent
